title: The Horse's Mouth
actors: Alec Guinness, Kay Walsh, Renee Houston
plot: An ill-behaved, lovably scruffy painter, Gulley Jimson, searches for a perfect canvas, determined to let nothing come between himself and the realization of his exalted vision.
language: English, French, Italian, Spanish, Cantonese, Norse, Old, Portuguese
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 5 wins & 6 nominations total
